name: Chocolate Cherry Bar
recipeIngredient: 1 Box Fudge or Chocolate Cake Mix
1 package Fudge or Chocolate Frosting Mix
1 large Spoon or Clean Carved Stick – Use the same stick to stir the cake and frosting (do not lick it during the process)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake mix and egg white powder in a 1 gallon zip lock bag, removing as much air as possible.
2. Place the frosting mix in another zip lock bag. Write the mixing instructions on the outside with a magic marker (Sanford Permanent or similar). Prepare this before cooking supper to allow it to cool slightly before consumption.
3. Line a cast iron Dutch oven with aluminum foil.
4. Lightly grease an aluminum Dutch oven.
5. Add the cherry pie filling and water to the cake mix in another bowl, stirring until well combined without puncturing the bag.
6. Pour all the mixture into the prepared Dutch oven.
7. Bake using about 12-15 charcoal briquets on the bottom rack and 15-20 on the top rack of the oven for approximately 40 minutes, or until the center is set.
8. While the cake/cherry mixture bakes, mix the frosting.
9. Once baked and slightly cooled, spread the frosting over the top.
10. Serve warm to cold.
